multilingual.title: Dark Mode

Testimonials.label: Testimonials
Testimonials.title: What Creators Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Designers, marketers, and developers around the world are using GPT2IMAGE every day.

items.content: The chat interface makes image generation feel effortless. I can describe what I'm imagining in plain language and iterate until it's perfect.
items.author: Sarah Lin

items.content: Batch generation saves me hours every week. I can produce a dozen hero image variations for A/B testing without breaking a sweat.
items.author: Michael Zhang

items.content: I signed up and had my first batch of images within minutes. The interface is incredibly intuitive — just describe what you want and the AI nails it.
items.author: Emily Chen

items.content: The gallery is how I stay organized. Every image I've ever generated is searchable, taggable, and a click away from being reused.
items.author: David Wang

items.content: Credits that never expire is a huge win. I can generate when inspiration strikes without worrying about a monthly clock running out.
items.author: Lisa Li

items.content: GPT2IMAGE replaced three other tools in my workflow. Chat-based prompting, batch runs, and a stunning gallery — it's everything in one place.
items.author: Kevin Zhao

FAQ.label: FAQ
FAQ.title: Questions You Might Have
FAQ.subtitle: Common questions about GPT2IMAGE and how it works.

items.question: What is GPT2IMAGE?
items.answer: GPT2IMAGE is an AI-powered platform that turns natural-language conversations into high-quality images. Describe what you want, and our AI generates it — no prompt engineering required. Features include chat-to-image generation, a visual gallery, batch generation, and a flexible credits system.

items.question: Which AI image models are supported?
items.answer: GPT2IMAGE supports the leading image generation models on the market, including GPT Image 2. Just sign up, choose a plan, and start generating — the platform handles model routing and delivers results in a unified interface.

items.question: How does the credits system work?
items.answer: Every image generation consumes a small number of credits based on the model and parameters you choose. Credits never expire, so unused credits are never wasted. You can subscribe to a monthly plan for recurring credits or top up whenever you need more.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Just sign up for a free account — no credit card required. You'll receive starter credits to try out image generation immediately. When you're ready for more, choose a subscription plan that fits your needs.

items.question: Does batch generation cost more?
items.answer: Batch generation consumes credits per image generated, the same as single generation. It's a convenience feature that lets you produce multiple variations in one request — perfect for exploring concepts or iterating on designs quickly.

items.question: Can I download and use the images commercially?
items.answer: Yes. Images you generate on GPT2IMAGE are yours to use — for personal, editorial, or commercial projects. Downloads are available in high resolution, and your full generation history stays in your gallery.
